active.name: KFC Rewards — Membership Program
active.description: New loyalty program. Sign-up welcome deal: 1 Crispy Chicken + 1 Pepsi (STD) for 25,000 VND. Members earn 3% points back per order, redeem rewards from KFC and partners, and get exclusive offers on the 15th of each month.

active.name: KFC Zestival (in-menu tie-in)
